title: Don Giovanni - Wikipedia
content: # *Don Giovanni*. 527; full title: *Il dissoluto punito, ossia il Don Giovanni*, literally 'The Rake "Rake (stock character)") Punished, or Don "Don (honorific)") Giovanni') is an opera in two acts with music by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart to an Italian libretto by Lorenzo Da Ponte. It was premiered by the Prague Italian opera at the National Theatre (of Bohemia), now called the Estates Theatre, on 29 October 1787. *Don Giovanni* is regarded as one of the greatest operas of all time and has proved a fruitful subject for commentary in its own right; critic Fiona Maddocks has described it as one of Mozart's "trio of masterpieces with librettos by Da Ponte". The Estates Theatre in Prague, venue of the world premiere of *Don Giovanni* in 1787. The opera was commissioned after the success of Mozart's trip to Prague in January and February 1787. Lorenzo Da Ponte's libretto is based on Giovanni Bertati's for the opera *Don Giovanni Tenorio*, which premiered in Venice early in 1787.

title: The Creation of Don Giovanni - Opera Omaha
content: Mozart's masterpiece *Don Giovanni*, first performed in Prague on October 29, 1787, stands as one of the most remarkable works in the history of Western music. The creation of *Don Giovanni* came after the tremendous success of Mozart's previous opera, *The Marriage of Figaro*. The theater impresario in Prague, buoyed by the reception of *Figaro*, commissioned Mozart for a new opera, leading to the birth of *Don Giovanni*. The story, with an Italian libretto by Mozart’s *Figaro* collaborator, Lorenzo Da Ponte, draws upon the legendary figure of Don Juan, the infamous seducer and libertine. The collaboration between Mozart and Da Ponte was crucial to the opera’s success. Over time, *Don Giovanni* became a symbol of Prague's rich operatic tradition and its contributions to the cultural heritage of Europe. * What to Know Before you Go to Beethoven's 5th & Bluebeard's Castle. * The Barber of Seville: From the General Director. * The Barber of Seville: From the Director. * The Barber of Seville: From the Conductor.

title: Music History Monday: Don Giovanni | Robert Greenberg
content: On October 29, 1787 – 221 years ago today – Wolfgang Mozart's opera Don Giovanni received its world premiere in the Bohemian capital of Prague.

title: What is the Story of Don Giovanni? Plot & More | ENO
content: # Discover Don Giovanni. *Don Giovanni* is an opera in two acts with music by Mozart. First performed in 1787, *Don Giovanni* is Mozart’s exhilarating retelling of the Don Juan legend, filled with some of his most famous and much-loved music. Combining comedy and tragedy, the opera follows the notorious womaniser as he lusts his way towards his dramatic downfall. ENO Don Giovanni: Introduction with Christopher Purves (Don Giovanni) and Director Richard Jones. ## ENO Don Giovanni: Production Gallery 2016. At Zerlina and Masetto’s wedding, Giovanni is about to make off with the bride, when Elvira intercepts him. Ottavio appears with Anna; he seeks his friend Giovanni’s help in searching for the Commendatore’s murderer. As Giovanni leaves, Anna tells Ottavio that she has recognised him as the Commendatore’s murderer. Giovanni forces Leporello to exchange identities with him, leading Elvira to believe that Leporello is in fact her lost husband. In the darkness, Anna, Ottavio, Zerlina and Masetto discover Leporello, whom they believe to be Giovanni.
